philosophy: Concentrated, high-conviction investing focused purely on intrinsic free-cash-flow expansion and durable total addressable market. Deliberately willing to underperform on a 1-year basis to capture multi-year IRR. Liquidity vacuums created by mechanical sellers are viewed as structured accumulation opportunities.
gross_net_style: 40-60% Long-Biased Net — structural long tilt maintained through cycles

factor_exposure.value: High — FCF yield is primary screening metric
factor_exposure.quality: Extreme High — balance sheet strength is non-negotiable
factor_exposure.momentum: Agnostic — explicitly ignored in position sizing

sector_concentration: High — top 5 positions frequently represent 40-60% of AUM

risk_constraints.forced_liquidation_trigger: Thesis invalidation ONLY — price alone never triggers a sale

preferred_instruments: Long-dated LEAPS for leverage on high-conviction thesis

historical_regime_behavior.q4_2018_rate_hike: Absorbed a 15-18% paper drawdown across core book. Added meaningfully to MSFT and AMZN at the December 2018 lows as systematic sellers created dislocation.
historical_regime_behavior.march_2020_covid: Deployed substantial cash reserves into structural growth equity during the selloff. Largest 30-day deployment in fund history.
historical_regime_behavior.q3_2022_inflation: Held core book through a -35% technical drawdown in quality growth. Did not reduce conviction — added to META at $95.

macro_reaction_function: Absorbs systemic panic systematically. When VaR-constrained capital (Quant, Pod) is forced to mechanically liquidate structurally sound assets, the Fundamental Tiger steps in as a liquidity provider — accumulating core thesis positions at materially discounted valuations.
confidence_notes: High Confidence. LP-enforced lockup mechanisms (typically 2-3 year lockup periods) provide the structural mandate to ignore short-term volatility. Behavior under macro stress is well-documented across Tiger Cub archetype.
